text_original: keep the timer till 29 min not the entire day
text_zh: 把计时器设为29分钟，而不是一整天
reply_original:
Hi there! I completely understand your frustration. It is really annoying when the conversation is going well and the limit runs out. I am so sorry for this experience!

To be transparent: maintaining high-quality AI involves very high server costs. Currently, ad revenue isn't enough to cover "unlimited" messages for everyone.
reply_zh:
你好！我完全理解你的沮丧。当对话进行得很顺利却达到限制时，确实非常令人恼火。对于这种体验，我深表歉意！

坦诚地说：维持高质量的人工智能涉及非常高的服务器成本。目前，广告收入不足以覆盖所有人的“无限”消息。
